info.title: Amelia REST API
info.description: The Amelia REST API allows for client applications to connect to Amelia and hold conversations using simple REST commands and webhookUrls or polling.

tags.name: AgenticMetrics
tags.description: Analytics APIs for cognitive agent performance

get.description: Retrieves a single Language Override by its unique identifier.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the Language Override

410.description: Session expired or invalid

put.description: Updates an existing Language Override. The ID in the body must match the path parameter.

400.description: Validation error

410.description: Session expired or invalid

delete.description: Deletes an existing Language Override by its unique identifier.

410.description: Session expired or invalid

get.description: Obtains the list of MCP Integrations in a particular domain, optionally filtered by name

parameters.name: domainId
parameters.description: The primary key of the domain containing the MCP Integrations

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Name of the MCP Integrations to filter against

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: A search term name to filter against

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The zero-indexed page of results to return

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: The size of each results page

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: A list of {field},{dir} sort directives, where dir can be asc or desc

parameters.name: X-Amelia-Rest-Token
parameters.description: The temporary access token provided upon initial login

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: The Authorization header for OAuth logins

200.description: Get a list of MCP Integrations

400.description: A status and message error, with optional other fields

410.description: A status and message error, typically when the session or conversation does not exist

get.description: Apply intents, entities, and classifiers to make NLU predictions for an utterance in a given domain.  Parameters should be encoded as per url query specification. Intended for testing purposes and not during conversations.

parameters.name: domainId
parameters.description: The primary key of the domain in which to make predictions

parameters.name: utterance
parameters.description: The utterance on which to make predictions

parameters.name: promptEntityId
parameters.description: Optional primary key of an entity to emulate Amelia's behavior on an "ask for the slot ..." task

parameters.name: intentId
parameters.description: Optional primary key of an intent to be used to constrain entity predictions, such as for testing the scoping of entities to intents when no intent classifier is available.

parameters.name: usePredictedDomain
parameters.description: Optional, determines whether to use predicted domain or not during FAQ prediction

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: Optional language to signal translation should be done to the selected domain's language. (ex. 'ja' or 'ja_JP')

parameters.name: X-Amelia-Rest-Token
parameters.description: The temporary access token provided upon initial login

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: The Authorization header for OAuth logins

200.description: NLU predictions for the input utterance

400.description: A status and message error, with optional other fields

410.description: A status and message error, typically when the session or conversation does not exist

usePredictedDomain.description: Optional, determines whether to use predicted domain or not during FAQ prediction

language.description: Optional language to signal translation should be done to the selected domain's language. (ex. 'ja' or 'ja_JP')

200.description: NLU predictions for the input utterance

400.description: A status and message error, with optional other fields

410.description: A status and message error, typically when the session or conversation does not exist

FeaturePreprocessorModel.description: Json to represent features of the utterance that are removed before being passed as input to the model. For ex, "PunctuationFilter" type, "punctuationRegex" field is [[!"#$%&'()*+,-./:;<=>@^_`{|}~\[\]\\]+].

name.description: Identifying and differentiating name of preprocessor

punctuationRegex.description: Regular expression applied to end of utterance for removing punctuation

fullPunctuationRegex.description: Regular expression applied to the 'entire' utterance for removing punctuation

stopWords.description: Comma-separated list of stopwords removed before computing features

replaceWords.description: Comma-separated list of words to be replaced. Used for whitelisting coref mentions.

tableName.description: Name of table references by this feature resource

keyColumn.description: Name of key column in table used when mapping inputs to values

mappingColumn.description: Name of value column in table for resulting mapping after a key is matched

domainId.description: Unique identifier for the domain in which to train a model

name.description: Human readable name for the classifier model to train

revisionName.description: Name of the specific classifier revision to be trained

modelId.description: Optional id that is used when upgrading an existing model.

modelRevisionId.description: ID for new classifier model revision upon training parameter updates.

trainingDocumentRevisions.description: List of training document revision unique identifiers

validationDocumentRevisions.description: List of validation document revision unique identifiers

trainOutOfDomain.description: If false, filter out negative examples and only train model on positive examples

numKeyPhrases.description: Number of key phrases to extract during training (or 0 to not extract phrases)

entities.description: Entity identifiers used for role classifiers or spanless entity training; required for training those classifiers

entity.description: Spanless entity ID or parent entity ID for role entities.

includeAll.description: Indicates whether all intents or entities should be including for training this model. If true, selectedIntents/selectedSlots should be empty and training/validation documents are optional

selectedIntents.description: List of intents to include during training.

selectedSlots.description: List of entities to include during training

selectedDomains.description: Selected domains to include for training.

includeEntitiesUtterance.description: Include entity utterances for domain classifier training.

algorithm.description: Algorithm configuration hyperparameters used for training.

autoAug.description: Boolean indicating whether or not to add default negative examples during intent training

crossValidationFolds.description: Number of cross validation folds to evaluate over during training.

enableCustomFeatures.description: Indicates if featurePipeline (set to true) should be used, or original XML-based features should be used

featurePipeline.description: Custom feature pipeline specification. This is a required field when enableCustomFeatures is true.

train.description: Indicates whether to kick off training from this model, or just update the revision

validate.description: Indicates whether or not to apply validation.

focusedEntityFeatures.description: Specific entities to be used as features during training.

validationResponse.description: Validation response prior to training, if validate is enabled.

useDatasetTags.description: Use dataset tags to separate datasets during training.

enum: LIBLINEAR_CLASSIFIER, LIBLINEAR_CLASSIFIER_L2R_LR, LIBLINEAR_TAGGER, CRFSUITE_TAGGER, PA_CLASSIFIER, PA_TAGGER, DNN_CLASSIFIER, DNN_TAGGER

trainingObjective.description: Training objective for this model. Indicates whether this model is for training intents (GOAL) or entities (SLOTS)

classifierType.description: Indicates the role of this classifier model in the system

id.description: Unique identifier for this classifier model

name.description: Human-readable name for this classifier model

domainId.description: Unique identifier for the domain associated with this classifier model

classifierType.description: Function of this classifier model in Amelia

id.description: Unique identifier for this classifier model revision

name.description: Human readable name for this classifier model revision

algorithm.description: The algorithm used in this revision

status.description: The current status of the revision

revisionNumber.description: The major/minor number of this revision

trainingSummary.description: The summary of training on this revision

corpusMetaData.description: The corpus data for this revision

classifierModel.description: Parent classifier model for this revision

evaluations.description: List of evaluations performed during training

rows.description: List of rows corresponding to actual labels and their number of misclassifications by predicted label

columns.description: List of column (prediction) labels for this confusion matrix

header.description: Gold label for the current row of a confusion matrix

values.description: Count of times the corresponding label by column index was predicted where the current row's actual label was the correct label

noOfUtterances.description: The number of utterances in this corpus

noOfGoals.description: The number of goals in this corpus

noOfSlots.description: The number of slots in this corpus

summary.description: Summary of evaluations statistics micro-averaged across all labels

label.description: The label for this per-label evaluation statistics row

correct.description: True positives (TP): The number of times this label was correctly predicted

gold.description: True positives plus false negatives (TP + FN): The number of instances with this label

system.description: True positives plus false positives (TP + FP): the number of instances that were predicted as having this label

f1.description: The F1 score for this label

id.description: Unique identifier for this model evaluation

name.description: Human-readable identifying name for this evaluation

stats.description: Pre-computed summary statistics for this model evaluation

confusions.description: Confusion matrix over gold vs. predicted values in this evaluation

misclassifications.description: List of predictions that did not match actual values (misclassifications) for this evaluation

predictions.description: List of predictions/targets for a given evaluation.

actual.description: Actual annotated value of target, such as an intent or entity code

predicted.description: Predicted value of target, such as an intent or entity code

context.description: Context of textual target, e.g. the sentence containing a predicted span

text.description: Textual target, e.g. the span of text covered by an entity

created.description: The instant this tabular data table was created

createdBy.description: The user who created the entity

modified.description: The instant the entity was last modified

modifiedBy.description: The user who last modified the entity

domainCode.description: The domain in which the tabular data exists

domainId.description: Domain unique identifier for this tabular data table

tableName.description: The name of the tabular data table

fileSize.description: The size of the file imported

rowCount.description: Number of rows in the tabular data

valid.description: Marks if the uploaded file is a valid tabular data input file

invalidReason.description: Populated if the tabular data was marked as invalid with the reason

numOfColumns.description: Number of columns in the tabular data

preview.description: Rows used for previewing file on the UI

file.description: The binary content of the file

delimiter.description: The column delimiter of the file, can be a comma, tab, semi-colon, or pipe (the actual character)

textQualifier.description: The column text qualifier, can be single quote, double quote, or an empty string (the actual character)

id.description: the primary key of the virtual host

name.description: the unique name of the virtual host

hostNames.description: the host names represented by this virtual host

description.description: a description of this virtual host

allowChatOverlay.description: ALLOW if this virtual host should allow chat overlays, DENY if it should prohibit them,and DEFAULT to defer to the global configured parameters

uiBundle.description: the primary key of an associated UIBundle

isDefault.description: true if the default virtual host for this Amelia

defaultTheme.description: the primary key of default theme

defaultLocale.description: the default locale for this Virtual Host

id.description: The unique id of the user

domainId.description: The primary domain id of the user

firstName.description: The first name of the user

lastName.description: The last name of the user

externalUid.description: The id of the User in an external system other than Amelia

maxAgentActiveChats.description: The max concurrent chats if user is an agent

excludeFromMetrics.description: Whether the user should be excluded from Metrics, defaults to false

passwordChangeAllowed.description: Whether the user can change password

memberGroups.description: Groups the user is a member of

changePassword.description: Flag indicating request is to change password

lastLogin.description: The date of last successful login, or null if none

lastFailedLogin.description: The date of last failed login, or null

id.description: The primary key of this escalation queue

enabled.description: Whether this queue is enabled or not

pickupTimeSla.description: The pickup time SLA, in seconds

pickupTimeWarning.description: The warning time SLA that a pickup is needed, in seconds

teams.description: The escalation teams associated with this queue

lastInteractionTimeSla.description: The agent interaction time SLA, in seconds

lastInteractionTimeWarning.description: The warning time SLA that an agent should respond to a user, in seconds

userIdleTime.description: The time after an agent utterance that a user will be marked as idle, in seconds

hasAutoEscalationMessages.description: If the queue has Auto Escalation Messages

autoEscalationMessageSelectionStrategy.description: The selection strategy for Auto Escalation Interval Messages

autoEscalationMessageInitialDelaySeconds.description: The minimum, in seconds, before the first Auto Escalation Message will be sent

autoEscalationMessageIntervalSeconds.description: The minimum interval, in seconds, between Auto Escalation Messages

autoEscalationMaxMessagesPostSlaBeforeAc.description: The number of Auto Escalation Messages past the SLA which will trigger the configured post SLA action.  0 means do not take any action for an SLA breach

autoEscalationSlaBreachResponsePoolCode.description: The response pool to use for final Auto Escalation Message before Post-SLA action is taken

maxConsecutiveRejectionOrTimeoutBeforeAc.description: The maximum number of agent TIMEOUT or REJECTED responses before configured actions is taken.  0 means never take alternate action in response to agent TIMEOUT or REJECTED

consecutiveRejectionOrTimeoutResponsePoo.description: The response pool to use for final agent TIMEOUT or REJECTED message before triggered action

consecutiveRejectionOrTimeoutSelectionSt.description: The selection strategy to use for final agent TIMEOUT or REJECTED message before triggered action

preventRequeueOnAgentPickupErrors.description: If escalations should be re-queued for another agent if an agent accepts an escalation but fails to pickup the conversation

preventRequeueResponsePoolCode.description: The response pool to use if re-queuing escalations on pickup errors has been disabled

preventRequeueSelectionStrategy.description: The selection strategy to use for sending messages when re-queuing escalations has been disabled

exportAll.description: If true, export all response templates from the specified escalation queue. If false, export only the templates specified in responseTemplateIds. In both cases, escalationQueueName is required.

responseTemplateIds.description: List of response template IDs to export. Required when exportAll=false. All IDs must belong to the specified escalation queue.

inScope.description: Indicates whether this entity is scoped to the current context's intent

IntentPrediction.description: Intent prediction result, with scores for intent classifier and intent detector

predictedIntent.description: Predicted intent, or null if no intent was predicted

domainScores.description: In-Domain/Out-of-domain binary classifier scores for CQA

IntentScoreModel.description: NLU settings for a given domain, such as thresholds for intent prediction

code.description: Intent code, uniquely identifying it within a given domain

negated.description: Indicates whether this intent was identified as negated

goalId.description: ID of corresponding goal, if one exists, for this intent prediction

domainId.description: Domain this intent is associated with (may be a parent domain)

NluSettings.description: NLU settings for a given domain, such as thresholds for intent prediction

intentPredictionThreshold.description: Threshold for intent prediction. An intent's score must be at or above this value to be predicted.

intentAmbiguityThreshold.description: Intent ambiguity threshold. If the difference between the top two intents' scores is less than this, and CQA is enabled, CQA will engage.

inDomainThreshold.description: In-domain threshold. The intent detector will consider an intent to be in-domain if its score is above this threshold (only applicable when using CQA + binary intent detector).

cqaIntentThreshold.description: CQA intent threshold. Intent scores must be above this threshold to trigger CQA.
